sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Compare before/after to see what changed after clicking on the blue object at (24,60)
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print('Before:', len(before))
print('After:', len(after))
before_colors = {n['color']: n['pixels'] for n in before}
after_colors = {n['color']: n['pixels'] for n in after}
print('Before colors:', before_colors)
print('After colors:', after_colors)
# Check what appeared/disappeared
for n in after:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 1:
        print('Single charcoal:', n)
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>
{"world_model": "Board has multiple colored objects. Pink bar at top is a timer that shrinks each action. Clicking on blue object at (24,60) - need to see what changed.",
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
